title: Authenticate with YOUR Account
description: Use your existing ChatGPT or GitHub Copilot login. No API keys needed, no middleman. Your credentials go straight to the provider, stored as GitHub Actions secrets you control.

title: Set Up in Seconds
description: Run the CLI wizard or local web UI, choose a path (new setup, fix auth, cleanup, maintenance), run auto-detect preflight, then apply setup with guided defaults.

title: Get AI Reviews on Every PR
description: The reviewer runs automatically in GitHub Actions. Inline comments, summary reviews, or hybrid mode. Auto-resolves stale threads. Configurable strictness and output style.
